---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that reposmerge doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like it to do?

## Parity note

This crate is a **faithful 1:1 port** of the Go tool. Features that would diverge
from the Go tool's behavior are out of scope unless they land in the Go tool first
or are explicitly additive without changing existing behavior.
